title: distephanus lastellei
intro: Distephanus lastellei, also known as the African bitter leaf, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Distephanus lastellei plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms associated with various health conditions.
